'''Algara II''', also referred to simply as '''Algara'''<ref name="PoG2" /> and '''Algar''',<ref name="CSWE-Algar">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' states that Algar, a planet mentioned several times in ''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' is the same as Algara II.</ref> was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Algaran system]]<ref name="PoG2" /> of the [[Lambda sector/Legends|Lambda sector]], located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="TEA-OC" /> with a population of approximately 1 billion. It was also the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Xan/Legends|Xan]]. Algara II was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by four [[Moon/Legends|moons]]: [[Kevron]], [[Omakaton]], [[Radeon]] and [[Tallakron]].<ref name="PoG2" />

==Geographic features==
On the planet Algara springs were wet and windy, summers were hot and humid, and winters were cold, with significant amounts of snowfall. Summer temperatures could reach 25 degrees [[Standard (temperature)|Standard]] at their zenith, while winter temperatures could drop as low as minus 15 degrees Standard.<ref name="PoG2" />

==History==
Algara II was the homeworld of the Xan [[Species/Legends|species]] and was settled by [[Human/Legends|Humans]] hundreds of years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="PoG2" />

The planet was the source the drugs [[Algarine torve weed]] and [[zwil]]. Zwil was especially addictive to [[Drovian]]s. It was the base of operations for [[Wing Tip Theel]], an expert [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] and former associate of [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].<ref name="CSWE" />

==Culture==
[[File:Algarians-PotGV2.jpg|thumb|left|The citizens of Algara II]]
Algara II had rules, regulations, and forms governing every conceivable thing and activity on the planet. Any off-worlder had to go through several steps in order to set foot on the Algara II. The planet's society was constructed around a rigid class structure. The upper classes got the best services, prices, seats on transportation, etc. Marriages between members of different classes were forbidden, and all [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] native of Algara wore badges identifying their rank in the society.

{{Planet-stub}}
